about.text: I have expertise in applied Computer Vision (CV) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). My current research centres on leveraging CV and RL for post-disaster evacuation planning and transportation logistics. In addition, with 5 years of industry experience, a Master’s degree in Computer Science, and an ongoing PhD in Industrial and Systems Engineering, I bring a strong inter-disciplinary perspective and the ability to develop and deploy optimized deep learning models for real-world industry use cases.
